description: Sets up the DNS records that let JMJ Billings send accounts-receivable reminder emails from your own domain and receive replies: DKIM signing, Return-Path (bounce handling), and the inbound MX record. All three point at Postmark, our email provider. Records are applied under the sending subdomain you choose (the standard Domain Connect host, e.g. 'mail').
variableDescription: %dkimSelector%: the Postmark DKIM selector label (the part before '._domainkey', unique per domain); %dkimValue%: the DKIM public-key TXT value issued by Postmark. The sending subdomain is supplied via the standard Domain Connect 'host' apply parameter (hostRequired), not as a template variable.
